Texts.LongWelcomeMessage: Welcome to the application. This is a startup project based on the ABP framework. For more information visit
Texts.MarketplacesHepsiburadaComingSoon: Hepsiburada integration screens will be added here.
Texts.Permission:Cimri.Probe: Probe a single Cimri product page
Texts.BeebakShareEmptyCard: No products on this card to record.
Texts.BeebakShareDuplicateToday: This exact product set was already shared today. Try again tomorrow or pick different products.
Texts.CimriShareCardsHint: Same data as the list. On each product photo: optional average across online offers (when at least two exist), then the best price; tap to open the cheapest merchant.
Texts.SharesLiveDeckPolling: Cimri sync is running — cards refresh automatically every ~1.5s.
Texts.SharesSharePlaceholder: Telegram integration will use this action.
Texts.SharesNoCards: No cards yet — pull Cimri products first, then build cards.
Texts.SharesBlockedHint: Products already shared today are excluded automatically.
Texts.SharesShareRecorded: Share recorded (Telegram will hook into this action later).
Texts.SharesNoLinks: No merchant links for this item.
Texts.SharesNoPermission: You don't have access to share cards.
Texts.CimriPullIntro: Enter any Cimri listing URL below (discounted feed or a category page). Selenium opens it and loads more if available; cards with a parsed discount percentage are processed highest-first. Offer expansion uses '+X Fiyat Teklifini Gör'. The product grid also sorts by highest discount first.
Texts.CimriClearDatabaseConfirm: This deletes all Cimri products, offers, merchants, sync history, and share records. Continue?
Texts.CimriIncludeOffersLabel: Open detail pages and parse merchant offers
Texts.CimriExpandAllOffersLabel: Click '+X Fiyat Teklifini Gör' to load all offers
Texts.CimriEmptyList: Nothing saved yet — press Pull & save. Requires BeeBAK.Cimri.Sync.
Texts.CimriLoadErrorTitle: Could not load products from the server
Texts.CimriListNetworkHint: The browser could not reach the API (status 0). With ng serve, ensure proxy.conf.json forwards /api to Http.Api.Host, restart ng serve after changing proxy.
Texts.CimriDevApiWrongHostHint: The response came from the Angular dev server, not BeeBAK.Http.Api.Host. Use proxy.conf.json, restart ng serve, run the API at https://localhost:44381.
Texts.CimriInvalidProductUrl: The product URL is missing or invalid.
Texts.CimriProductUrlMustBeHttps: Only HTTPS Cimri product URLs are allowed.
Texts.CimriInvalidBaseUrl: Cimri BaseUrl in configuration is invalid.
Texts.CimriProductUrlHostNotAllowed: That URL host is not allowed. Use the same host as Cimri:BaseUrl.
Texts.CimriInvalidListingUrl: The listing URL is invalid or not HTTPS.
Texts.CimriListingUrlHostNotAllowed: The listing URL host must match Cimri:BaseUrl or Cimri:AllowedCimriHostSuffix in configuration.
Texts.CimriListingUrlNotConfigured: No listing URL is configured. Paste the full HTTPS Cimri listing URL in the sync form, or set Cimri:ListingPageUrl in appsettings/environment.
Texts.CimriBaseUrlOrHostSuffixRequired: Either Cimri:BaseUrl or Cimri:AllowedCimriHostSuffix must be set for product URL host validation.
Texts.CimriListingPagePlaceholder: Full HTTPS listing URL (you choose the page)
Texts.CimriSyncQueuedInfo: Job queued; the progress bar below shows live status.
Texts.CimriSyncListingFromServerHint: (address came from server Cimri:ListingPageUrl because the form field was empty)
Texts.CimriSyncListingFromFormHint: (address from the listing URL field above)
Texts.CimriInvalidMaxProducts: MaxProducts must be at least 1 when set.
Texts.CimriProductDetailFetchFailed: Could not fetch the Cimri product detail page.
Texts.AkakcePullIntro: Pull the Akakce biggest price-drop list with Selenium, enqueue detail pages through RabbitMQ, and store products, sellers, and offers separately from Cimri.
Texts.AkakceClearDatabaseConfirm: This deletes all Akakce products, offers, merchants, and Akakce sync history. Continue?
Texts.AkakceIncludeOffersLabel: Open detail pages and parse seller offers
Texts.AkakceEmptyList: Nothing saved yet - press Pull & save. Requires BeeBAK.Akakce.Sync.
Texts.AkakceSyncQueuedInfo: Job queued; the progress bar below shows live status.
Texts.AkakceInvalidMaxProducts: MaxProducts must be at least 1 when set.
Texts.AkakceInvalidListingUrl: The listing URL is invalid or not HTTPS.
Texts.AkakceListingUrlHostNotAllowed: The listing URL host must match Akakce:BaseUrl or Akakce:AllowedAkakceHostSuffix in configuration.
Texts.AkakceListingUrlNotConfigured: No listing URL is configured. Paste the full HTTPS Akakce listing URL in the sync form, or set Akakce:ListingPageUrl.
Texts.AkakceBaseUrlOrHostSuffixRequired: Either Akakce:BaseUrl or Akakce:AllowedAkakceHostSuffix must be set for product URL host validation.
Texts.AkakceProductDetailFetchFailed: Could not fetch the Akakce product detail page.
